semantic_review.mechanism: null-versus-zero preservation through normalization and aggregation
semantic_review.source_skeleton: pure normalization and statistical rollup functions composed by a report service
semantic_review.final_boundary: multi-metric report-service composition across null, zero, and numeric-string values
semantic_review.final_novelty: Feedback isolates normalization and rollup units; final composes both through buildDailyReport, crosses two metrics, and verifies mixed null, measured zero, and numeric-string handling end to end.
semantic_review.prohibited_overlap: Telemetry missing-value preservation and arithmetic rollup do not implement any prohibited mechanism.
semantic_review.feedback_boundary: Unit boundary: null preservation in normalizeObservation and measured-zero inclusion in summarizeMetric are asserted independently.

final_novelty.detail: Feedback isolates normalization and rollup units; final composes both through buildDailyReport, crosses two metrics, and verifies mixed null, measured zero, and numeric-string handling end to end.
final_novelty.summary: Feedback isolates normalization and rollup units; final composes both through buildDailyReport, crosses two metrics, and verifies mixed null, measured zero, and numeric-string handling end to end.

semantic_review.mechanism: attempt-token fencing for late asynchronous job settlement
semantic_review.source_skeleton: mutable class-backed job store coordinated by an asynchronous runner
semantic_review.assertion_family: state-transition rejection and claim-identity argument invariants
semantic_review.final_boundary: stale failure rejection plus runner failure-token forwarding
semantic_review.final_novelty: Feedback covers stale completion and the runner success path; final adds the distinct stale-failure transition and verifies Error identity plus attempt forwarding on the runner failure path.
semantic_review.prohibited_overlap: Attempt fencing for watchdog-requeued jobs is not release-reader retirement, configuration replacement/reload, or another prohibited mechanism.
semantic_review.feedback_boundary: Store/runner API boundary: stale completion rejection and successful runner forwarding of the claim attempt are asserted independently.

final_novelty.detail: Feedback covers stale completion and the runner success path; final adds the distinct stale-failure transition and verifies Error identity plus attempt forwarding on the runner failure path.

semantic_review.mechanism: comma-list token normalization combined with media-type parameter matching
semantic_review.source_skeleton: configuration parser and pure predicate composed by a decision factory
semantic_review.assertion_family: normalized token-list equality and Boolean decision-matrix invariants
semantic_review.final_boundary: factory-decider integration with spaced config, parameterized types, binary exclusion, and undefined input

semantic_review.feedback_boundary: Unit boundary: comma-list whitespace normalization and parameter-insensitive Content-Type matching are asserted independently.

cross_case.duplicate_finding: No mechanism, source skeleton, semantic assertion family, or final boundary is duplicated across the three cases.
cross_case.prohibited_finding: No exact prohibited phrase occurs, and manual semantic review found no material overlap. The compression case uses static parsing only, not replacement/reload behavior.

Store/runner API boundary: stale completion rejection and successful runner forwarding of the claim attempt are asserted independently.

author_inventory.canonical_format: UTF-8 lines sorted by relative path: <lowercase-file-sha256><two spaces><forward-slash-path><LF>

source_skeleton_normalization.input: Baseline candidate source text from case.json repo_files, in UTF-8.
lexical_rules: Replace each single-quoted, double-quoted, or template string literal, including its payload, with STR.
Replace each decimal, binary, octal, hexadecimal, exponent, or bigint numeric literal payload with NUM.
Preserve the documented ECMAScript control/declaration/literal keywords exactly; replace other ASCII identifiers with ID.
Preserve operators and punctuation; discard original whitespace; join tokens with one ASCII space and no trailing newline.
source_skeleton_normalization.per_candidate_hash: SHA-256 of normalized UTF-8 bytes, lowercase hexadecimal.
source_skeleton_normalization.combined_hash: Sort candidates by ASCII path; concatenate <path><LF><normalized-text><LF> for each; SHA-256 the combined UTF-8 bytes.
